title: Venmathi Venmathiye Song Lyrics Minnale
stanzas:
Venmathi venmathiye nillu
nee vanukka megathukka sollu

[Venmathi venmathiye nillu
nee vanukka megathukka sollu
vanam thaan unnudaiya
istham endraam
megathuku illai oru nashtam

unnai indrodu
naan marappene
naan marappenae
unnaala nenjil poothak kadhal
melum melum
thunban vendaam] (2)

Jannalin vali
vandhu vilundhadhu
minnalin oli
adhil therindhadhu
azhagu dhevathai
adhisaya mugamae

theepori ena
iru vizhigalum
theekuchchi ena
enai urasida
kodi pookkalaai
malarandhadhu manamae

aval azhagai paada
oru mozhi illaiye
alandhu paarka pala
vizhi illaiye

enna irundha podhum
aval enadhillaiye
marandhu po
en manamae.

Oh ho ho..
Venmathi venmathiye nillu
nee vanukka megathukka sollu
vanam thaan unnudaiya
istham endraam
megathuku illai oru nashtam

unnai indrodu
naan marappene
naan marappenae
unnaala nenjil poothak kadhal
melum melum thunban vendaam

Anju naal varai
aval pozhindhadhu
aasaiyin mazhai
adhil nenaindhadhu
nooru jenmangal
ninaivinil irukkum

aaru pol enthan naal
varum uyir urugiya
andhanaal sugam
adhai ninaikaiyil
rathanaalangal
raathiri vedikkum.

oru nimisham kooda
ennai piriyavillai
vivaram yedhum
aval ariyavillai

enna irundha podhum
aval enadhillaiye
marandhu po
en manamae.

unnai indrodu
naan marappene
naan marappenae
unnaala nenjil poothak kadhal
melum melum
thunban vendaam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Venmathi Venmathiye'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Minnale'?

In the movie, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings for his love interest, showcasing their romantic journey.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Roopkumar Rathod and Tipu.

Who composed the music for 'Venmathi Venmathiye'?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Venmathi Venmathiye' released?

The song was released on February 2, 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Venmathi Venmathiye, the protagonists express their deep affection and yearning for each other, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners to moments of love and connection. Set against the backdrop of Minnale, it beautifully encapsulates the emotions of young love and the desire to be with one's beloved. The collaboration between Roopkumar Rathod and Tipu adds a unique charm, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Venmathi Venmathiye from Minnale is a mesmerizing romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Roopkumar Rathod and Tipu, paired with Harrish Jeyaraj's soulful composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of love through its poetic lyrics and melodious tunes that resonate with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: Stay here, sweet one, tell the sky for you.
Stay here, sweet one, tell the sky that the sky is your wish, there is no loss in that.
I won't forget you, I won't forget you, don't let love bloom in my heart again and again.
The pain of the world has fallen, the beauty of lightning has revealed a divine face.
Even if I am a firefly, my eyes are like a spark, my heart has blossomed like a flower.
There are no words to describe her beauty, there are no eyes to see her fully.
As long as she is there, she is mine, my heart forgets her.
Oh ho ho.. Stay here, sweet one, tell the sky for you. The sky is your wish, there is no loss in that.
I won't forget you, I won't forget you, don't let love bloom in my heart again and again.
For five days, her desires have fallen like rain, in that, a hundred lifetimes will remain in memory.
When will my life come like a wave, that thought brings comfort to my nights.
Not even for a moment can I be apart from her, she doesn't know anything.
As long as she is there, she is mine, my heart forgets her.
I won't forget you, I won't forget you, don't let love bloom in my heart again and again.
